commands.repair_reason: A maintainer should decide whether to ship the Swift v2 signing fallback; there is no narrow automated repair to request from ClawSweeper.; Cleared: The diff changes auth signature canonicalization but reuses an existing v2 verifier contract and adds no dependency, CI, secret, or artifact execution path. (sha=a99c65a973d3bfa2e9f1288d9a25ba3e06b40c03)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a Swift v2 device-auth payload builder, switches Swift gateway connect signing from v3 to v2 for deployed gateway compatibility, adds reset helpers, and adds a Swift v2 payload-vector test.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main Swift signs only v3 while the gateway still has a v2 verifier fallback, and the PR body supplies redacted live logs from an older v2-only gateway path failing before and connecting after the patch.
commands.review_followup: A maintainer should decide whether to ship the Swift v2 signing fallback; there is no narrow automated repair to request from ClawSweeper.
